docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2014 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED AND AMENDED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 02/26/2014. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. JUDGE PRO TEM THERESA MOORE, CLERK JEAN KONG, D525, NOT REPORTED. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SEO, ALICE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT DOOR, LAUREN $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,500.00, BY STIPULATED AGREEMENT. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 2/26/2014. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP1952. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED JAN-14-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOOR, LAUREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEO, ALICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOOR, LAUREN $5,630.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:20am
Judge Pro Tem Theresa Moore, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Lauren Door appears by counsel, Daniel J. Jungwirth; Respondent Alice Seo appears in pro per with husband Jay Seo. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Moore.

Appellant counsel informed Judge Moore that both parties has come to agreement of total amount $5500.00 in favor of plaintiff/respondent; Judge Moore clarifys with the plaintiff/respondent Ms. Seo if she has agreed to the amount and that she will have to collect the judgment herself and then send in the satisfiction of judgment to the Court. Ms. Seo said she has agreed to the amount and understood the process. Judge rendered a total judgment of $5500.00 in open Court.

10:25am

Case adjourned.No evidence presented.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Judgment Entered
